description: Feishu/Lark platform event configuration page showing subscription settings with tabs for event config, callback config, and encryption policy.
Discord conversation with OpenClaw bot showing HTTP 429 rate limit errors, user commands like /status and /whoami, and bilingual bot responses in Chinese and English.
Dark-themed UI showing a progress indicator proposal using hourglass and number emojis to represent thinking time stages from start to completion.
Chat interface showing GSD bot configuration with API key errors, model switching to gpt-5.4, and user interaction with /model command.
Browser tab bar showing multiple open tabs including Weixin, Feishu, GitHub, Claude.ai, Slack, and other development-related pages with Weixin captcha URL visible.
Feishu/Lark knowledge base permission dialog for adding editable members with user list showing admin privileges and organization structure.
OpenClaw configuration page showing custom provider setup with API protocol dropdown, Ollama integration options, and onboarding controls.
Group chat showing WLB and GSD bots interacting with channel errors, greeting messages, and echo behavior between automated agents.
Discord conversation with OpenClaw bot using browser-use tool to search GitHub for projects, showing Python script execution and API key retrieval from config.
GitHub 404 error page with desert scene, Octocat character, sign-in popup, and footer with navigation links
